possible_dialog: LET US GET TO WORK HUMAN.
unavailable_msg: The robot appears to still be booting up its subsystems, you should come back later...
first_dialog: GREETINGS. I AM LAWNBOT-843C HOW MAY I BE OF ASSISTANCE?
PROCESSING INPUT... SORRY, BUT UNLESS YOU HAVE A WORK CONTRACT FROM THE JOB BOARD, I MAY NOT ALLOW YOU TO HELP ME MOW THE LAWN. APOLOGIES. HOW ELSE CAN I HELP YOU?
SCANNING... SCANNING... PROCESSING... NO ANOMALIES DETECTED. VALID CONTRACT.
player_dialog: Um, do you need any help mowing the lawn?
Actually, I, um, have a contract right here!
Okay, I presume that's good, right?
first_job_offer: CORRECT. YOU MAY NOW PROVIDE ASSISTANCE WITH MOWING STORE CORP'S LAWN. CALCULATING WAGE...
